name: send-anon-to-tealium
description: Send anonymous chat interaction data to Tealium Collect using tealium_visitor_id

tealiumVisitorId.description: The pseudonymous tealium_visitor_id for the visitor

sentiment.description: Detected sentiment of the user message

intent.description: Detected intent of the user message

topic.description: Detected topic of the user message

collectAnonApiUrl.description: Tealium Collect API URL for anonymous chat events

traceId.description: Optional trace ID for debugging / request tracing
